ai_services.name: Demo OpenAI GPT-5.4
ai_services.description: Primary LLM for most demo agents

embedding_services.name: text-embedding-3-small
embedding_services.description: Vector embeddings for the demo Silo

fields.name: key_points
fields.description: Key points extracted from the content

fields.name: word_count
fields.description: Approximate word count of the original content

fields.name: caveats
fields.description: Caveats or limitations of the answer

mcp_configs.name: AWS Doc Search MCP
mcp_configs.description: Example external MCP server connection — URL is a placeholder

silos.name: Demo Knowledge Base
silos.description: Central vector store for all RAG demo agents

domains.name: MattinAI Docs Website
domains.description: Web scraping source for documentation — URL is a placeholder

agents.name: Demo Knowledge Base Agent
agents.description: RAG retrieval agent — uses vector silo for grounded answers
agents.system_prompt: You are a knowledge base assistant. Use only the provided context documents to answer questions. If the answer is not in the context, say so explicitly. Always cite the source document name when referencing information.

agents.name: Demo Conversational Assistant
agents.description: Memory-enabled conversational agent — demonstrates multi-turn context retention
agents.system_prompt: You are a helpful conversational assistant. Maintain context across the conversation and refer back to earlier messages when relevant. Be friendly and adaptive to the user's communication style.

agents.name: Demo Document Summarizer (Structured)
agents.description: Structured output agent — demonstrates OutputParser for JSON responses
agents.system_prompt: You are a document analysis agent. Given a document or passage, extract a structured summary following the output schema precisely. Be thorough but concise.

agents.name: Demo Intent Classifier (Tool)
agents.description: Tool sub-agent — used by the orchestrator via agent_tool_refs. Set is_tool=true after import.
agents.system_prompt: You are an intent classifier. Given a user message, classify its intent into one of: question, request, complaint, feedback, greeting, or other. Return a structured answer with your confidence score and reasoning.

agents.name: AWS Doc Search Agent (MCP)
agents.description: AWS Doc Search agent — demonstrates external MCP tool usage. The MCP server is expected to handle the search logic and return relevant document excerpts.
agents.system_prompt: You are an AWS Doc Search agent. When given a query, use the connected AWS Docs Search MCP to retrieve relevant document excerpts. Use the retrieved information to answer the user's question. Always cite the source document name when referencing information.

agents.name: Demo OCR Document Processor
agents.description: OCR agent — demonstrates dual-LLM pattern (vision + text) with structured output
agents.vision_system_prompt: Extract all visible text from each scanned page. Include headers, footers, captions, and table content. Preserve the reading order and paragraph structure.
agents.text_system_prompt: You are an OCR post-processor. Take the raw extracted text and structure it according to the output schema. Clean up OCR artifacts and normalize formatting.
